title: berkheya tysonii
intro: Berkheya tysonii, also known as Tyson's daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a shrubby perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. Berkheya tysonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
